title: Parkio Daily for June 24, 2026
teaser: Jollywood Nights extends into January 2027; Astrofizz now offers mobile order; Wilderness Lodge A/C offline for repairs.

breaking.title: Jollywood Nights extends into January 2027 with new entertainment
breaking.body: Hollywood Studios confirmed that the holiday after-hours event will run select nights from November through early January 2027, marking the first time the separately ticketed party stretches beyond December. Expect themed entertainment and festive décor on Sunset Boulevard.

parkioInsight.text: January dates typically see lighter attendance than November and December holiday events. Booking the later nights often means shorter lines for character meets and food stations.

breaking.title: Wilderness Lodge shuts off air conditioning for maintenance
breaking.body: The resort turned off cooling systems Wednesday morning for repairs after a week of problems. Guests received notices about the temporary outage.

parkioInsight.text: If you have a Wilderness Lodge reservation today, consider booking a backup dining reservation at a nearby resort with working climate control. Lobby and room temperatures may be uncomfortable until systems restart.

bignews.title: Astrofizz kiosk launches mobile ordering in Tomorrowland
bignews.body: The snack stand that replaced Cool Ship last fall now lets guests order drinks and treats through the My Disney Experience app, cutting down on queue time.

parkioInsight.text: Mobile order typically shaves five to ten minutes off midday waits. Place your Astrofizz order before heading to Space Mountain and pick up on your way out.

bignews.title: July 8 and 9 now open for Annual Passholders without reservations
bignews.body: Disney World added two Good-to-Go days in early July for all four pass tiers, meaning holders can visit any theme park those dates without a park reservation.

parkioInsight.text: Good-to-Go windows often bring a modest uptick in passholder visits, especially at EPCOT and Magic Kingdom. Arrive at rope drop if you want shorter lines for headliners those mornings.

bignews.title: Disney World holiday season kicks off November 13
bignews.body: The official 2026 holiday period runs through January 6, 2027. The announcement came via a video featuring the Dapper Dans in seasonal attire.

parkioInsight.text: The first two weeks of the season usually offer lighter crowds than Thanksgiving week or the December rush. Booking mid-November often means shorter waits for decorated park photos and holiday shows.

bignews.title: Disney gift cards now load into digital wallet for faster checkout
bignews.body: Guests can save multiple gift cards in the MyDisney wallet and use them directly in the Walt Disney World and Disneyland apps, speeding up mobile orders and ticket purchases.

parkioInsight.text: If you buy discounted gift cards in bulk, load them into the app before your trip. Mobile food orders complete faster when payment is already stored, especially during lunch and dinner rushes.

topstories.title: Homecomin' adds Friday brunch service for Fourth of July weekend
topstories.body: Chef Art Smith's Disney Springs restaurant will serve brunch Friday through Sunday around Independence Day, expanding its usual Saturday and Sunday schedule.

parkioInsight.text: Brunch reservations at Homecomin' fill quickly on weekends. Booking the Friday slot may offer better availability and shorter waits than Saturday or Sunday.

topstories.title: Animal Kingdom quietly adds new cast member to Kilimanjaro Safaris narration
topstories.body: Guests recently noticed an updated voice during the safari ride. The change appears to have happened without official announcement.

parkioInsight.text: Safaris remain best in the first operating hour when animals are most active. The updated narration is another reason to ride early before midday heat drives wildlife into shade.

topstories.title: New snack location confirmed for Downtown Disney at Disneyland
topstories.body: Disney announced a fresh food spot will open in the Anaheim shopping and dining district, though details on menu and timing remain limited.

parkioInsight.text: Downtown Disney additions usually draw crowds in their first weeks. If you visit Disneyland soon, plan to stop by early in the day before lines build at the new location.

topstories.title: Crush's Coaster at Disneyland Paris enters longest refurbishment yet
topstories.body: The spinning coaster will close September 7 for its most extensive technical overhaul since opening in 2007. No reopening date has been announced.

parkioInsight.text: If Crush's Coaster is on your Paris bucket list, book a trip before early September. The closure may stretch several months given the scope of work described.

topstories.title: BoardWalk expansion to bring new dining and entertainment late 2026
topstories.body: Disney confirmed several fresh experiences will debut at the lakeside resort starting toward year's end, continuing the venue's recent revitalization.

parkioInsight.text: BoardWalk venues tend to be less crowded than Disney Springs on weeknights. If you're visiting late 2026, the new spots may offer easier walk-up seating than established locations.

topstories.title: Footage surfaces of teen's fall from Tiana's Bayou Adventure vehicle
topstories.body: Video published by TMZ shows the June 21 incident at Disneyland in which a 13-year-old exited a ride car before the attraction ended and slid down the 50-foot drop. The guest sustained injuries and Disney confirmed the ride was operating normally.

parkioInsight.text: Remind children to stay seated with lap bars secured until cast members give the all-clear. On water rides, exiting early poses serious injury risk even if the vehicle appears stopped.

topstories.title: Germany pavilion closure rumored at EPCOT with no official date
topstories.body: Reports suggest a refurbishment of the World Showcase pavilion may be in the works, though Disney has not confirmed timing or scope.

parkioInsight.text: If you love the Germany pavilion's shops or dining, visit soon. Refurbishment announcements often come with little lead time, and closures can stretch months.

icymi.title: Disney Store app pilots AI shopping assistant for select iOS users
icymi.body: A new feature lets a small group of guests ask questions and receive product recommendations through artificial intelligence. The pilot aims to improve discovery and personalization.

icymi.title: Toy Story 5 merchandise and food arrive across Disney parks
icymi.body: With the film opening June 19, themed snacks and souvenirs featuring updated character looks are now available at Walt Disney World and Disneyland.

icymi.title: Cinderella Castle refresh team shares behind-the-scenes details
icymi.body: Cast members who worked on the recent exterior updates discussed the painstaking process of cleaning and restoring the Magic Kingdom icon.

spotlight.title: Bluey's Wild World now open daily at Animal Kingdom through summer
spotlight.body: The Australia-themed character zone featuring Bluey, Bingo, and live animals from their home country launched May 26 and will stick around beyond the Cool Kids' Summer promotion. Families can meet the characters and explore interactive animal habitats.

parkioInsight.text: Character meets with Bluey tend to draw long waits by mid-morning, often exceeding an hour. Rope-drop Animal Kingdom and head straight to the Bluey area if your kids are fans.
